summary: Full backend + frontend validation of the new Student Profile (7-tab) page and Reports section. Backend: 13/13 new pytest cases in test_reports.py pass — RBAC (401 unauth, 403 admin, 200 teacher), 404 unknown id, profile aggregate shape, /student/{id}/attendance with date-range filter, /class/attendance with ISO-string from/to (not null), and all four smart-status thresholds (urgent≥5 absent, watch≥5 late, watch≥3 early_leave, stable default). Frontend: nivin/123456 login → /students/{id} renders all 9 expected testids (student-profile-page, profile-tabs, tab-profile, tab-attendance, tab-grades, tab-assignments, tab-behavior, tab-activities, tab-reports, back-to-students); profile tab shows name/birth/address/notes/parents; attendance tab loads counts + att-row, att-from/att-to date filter narrows results (jan 2026 filter → 1 row), smart-badge-stable rendered; reports tab exposes student-report + print-student-report and window.print() executes without crashing the page; @media print CSS and .print:hidden classes are present. /reports page renders reports-page with all 7 cards, 4 'قريبًا' badges, class_attendance card opens report-class-attendance with report-from/report-to/report-print. Cleanup via DELETE /api/students/{id} succeeded. No console errors during the run.

issues: Empty-state for these 4 'coming-soon' tabs does NOT contain the words 'قريبًا' / 'لا توجد' / 'لا يوجد' — page renders without crash but the EmptyState may be missing or showing only an icon. Verify the four empty tabs render a visible 'coming soon' message (testid optional, but a label like 'قريبًا' is expected per PRD).
birth_date input uses native HTML <input type='date'> (browser default picker) instead of a shadcn/ui Calendar component. Pre-existing, but worth flagging.

When the teacher has zero students/subjects, the home dashboard still shows hard-coded demo values (e.g. 'عدد الطلاب 30', schedule rows for رياضيات/عربية/علوم/اجتماعيات/إنجليزية, 'الطلاب الغائبون 2'). The PRD explicitly forbids demo data — this is pre-existing but contradicts the same rule the new screens enforce.

action_items: Add visible 'coming soon' (قريبًا) text inside the EmptyState rendered by tab-grades/tab-assignments/tab-behavior/tab-activities so users understand the tab is intentionally empty.

(Pre-existing, low-priority) Replace the home dashboard demo data with real DB-backed counts or hide the cards when there is no data — matches the same 'no demo data' rule enforced in StudentProfilePage/Reports.
(Pre-existing, low-priority) Consider replacing the native <input type='date'> in the student-create modal with a shadcn Calendar for design consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/teacher_app/routes/reports.py is clean: all 4 endpoints scope queries by teacher_id from the JWT, exclude Mongo _id via projection, validate from/to with regex r'^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$', and default to last-30-days when omitted (from/to always ISO strings, never null — explicit test case passes).

_smart_status thresholds exactly match the spec (absent≥5 urgent; late≥5 OR (absent≥2 AND late≥2) watch; early_leave≥3 watch; else stable). Each branch verified end-to-end with real attendance records.

_attendance_summary computes attendance_rate = (present + late) / total — treating 'late' as still attending is a reasonable product call, but worth documenting since some schools count late as a partial absence.

class_attendance_report does N+1 _attendance_summary calls (one per student). Fine for ~30-40 students per class, but at >200 students it will slow down. Aggregation pipeline ($group by student_id) would be the upgrade path.

Frontend StudentProfilePage correctly renders empty arrays for grades/assignments/behavior/activities (no fabricated numbers), but the EmptyState component does not include a visible 'coming soon' label — minor UX gap.
Print path: window.print() is hooked correctly, .print:hidden utility classes are applied to sidebar/topbar/toolbar, and @media print rules are present in App.css. Tested without crash.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 reports tests pass; prior 17/17 attendance + 20/21 full_stack regression suites untouched and still expected to pass)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the testids and flows in scope; one minor design gap (coming-soon label) and two pre-existing issues noted above

test_credentials: Admin bsn.1988 / 12abAB!?  ;  Teacher nivin / 123456 (seeded, confirmed working). All TEST_ data cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixtures create+teardown TEST_rep_* teacher with cascade-clean students/attendance. UI test created 1 TEST_UI_طالب student + 1 absence record on 2026-01-15 and DELETEd both at the end of the run (HTTP 200 confirmed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_reports.py (13 tests). Combined with /app/backend/tests/test_attendance.py (17) and /app/backend/tests/test_full_stack.py (20/21 — line 293 still has the outdated admin-preview assertion noted in iteration_2). For UI tests, the teacher 'nivin' may have 0 students after a previous teardown — create one via POST /api/students before testing /students/{id}. The home dashboard (الرئيسية) currently shows hard-coded demo numbers when DB is empty; flag if not intentional. Native HTML date pickers are used in the add-student modal (testid student-form-birth).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in the in-scope feature. The three flagged items are design/UX (empty-state label) or pre-existing (home demo data, native date input).
